sentences.target: Cette journée est rude pour nous.

translations.fr: Cette journée est rude pour nous.
translations.en: This day is rough for us.
translations.es: Este día es duro para nosotros.
translations.de: Dieser Tag ist anstrengend für uns.
translations.it: È una giornata dura per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这一天对我们来说很艰难。
translations.yue: 今日對我哋嚟講好辛苦。
translations.pt: Este dia é difícil para nós.
translations.vi: Hôm nay thật vất vả với chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Deze dag is zwaar voor ons.
translations.hi: आज का दिन हमारे लिए कठिन है.
translations.pl: Ten dzień jest dla nas trudny.
translations.el: Αυτή η μέρα είναι δύσκολη για εμάς.
translations.nb: Denne dagen er tøff for oss.
translations.sv: Den här dagen är tuff för oss.
translations.ro: Ziua asta este grea pentru noi.
translations.cs: Tento den je pro nás těžký.
translations.da: Denne dag er hård for os.
translations.ja: 今日は私たちにとって大変な一日です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'journée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'est'.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject 'journée' to predicate adjective 'rude'.
Predicative adjective (subject complement) agreeing in singular with 'journée'; means harsh/demanding.
Preposition introducing the affected/beneficiary 'nous'; forms a PP complement to the adjective 'rude'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural (stressed form), object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Le vent est rude ce matin.

translations.fr: Le vent est rude ce matin.
translations.en: The wind is harsh this morning.
translations.es: El viento está fuerte esta mañana.
translations.de: Der Wind ist heute Morgen heftig.
translations.pt: O vento está forte esta manhã.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί ο άνεμος είναι δυνατός.
translations.nb: Det er kraftig vind i dag tidlig.
translations.sv: Vinden är hård i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: Vântul este puternic în dimineața asta.
translations.da: Vinden er hård her til morgen.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determiner for 'vent'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'est'.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject 'vent' to predicate adjective 'rude'.
Predicative adjective (subject complement) describing 'vent' as harsh/severe.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'matin' in the temporal NP 'ce matin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; with 'ce' forms an adverbial time expression functioning as a circumstantial modifier.

sentences.target: On trouve ça rude à gérer.

translations.fr: On trouve ça rude à gérer.
translations.en: We find it tough to handle.
translations.de: Wir finden das schwer zu bewältigen.
translations.yue: 我哋覺得呢樣嘢好難應付。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy khó xử lý việc này.
translations.ar: نجد صعوبة في التعامل مع هذا.
translations.nl: We vinden dit moeilijk aan te pakken.
translations.hi: हमें इसे संभालना मुश्किल लगता है.
translations.el: Το βρίσκουμε δύσκολο να το διαχειριστούμε.
translations.nb: Vi synes dette er vanskelig å håndtere.
translations.id: Kami merasa ini sulit untuk ditangani.
translations.sv: Vi tycker att det är svårt att hantera.
translations.ro: Ni se pare greu de gestionat.
translations.da: Vi synes, det er svært at håndtere.
translations.ja: 私たちはこれを扱うのが大変だと感じています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal pronoun used as subject; typically corresponds to 'we/one' in English.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes direct object 'ça' and an object predicative 'rude' (plus infinitival complement).
Demonstrative pronoun (neuter), direct object of 'trouve'.
Adjective used as object complement (object predicative) describing 'ça'; modified by the infinitival complement 'à gérer'.
Preposition introducing the infinitive 'gérer'; forms a complement to the adjective 'rude' ('rude à gérer').
Verb in infinitive form; complement of the preposition 'à' and of the adjective 'rude'.

sentences.target: Ce canapé est rude à porter.

translations.fr: Ce canapé est rude à porter.
translations.en: This couch is tough to carry.
translations.es: Este sofá es difícil de cargar.
translations.de: Dieses Sofa ist schwer zu tragen.
translations.it: Questo divano è difficile da portare.
translations.pt: Este sofá é difícil de carregar.
translations.vi: Chiếc sofa này rất khó khiêng.
translations.nl: Deze bank is lastig te tillen.
translations.el: Είναι δύσκολο να μεταφερθεί αυτός ο καναπές.
translations.nb: Denne sofaen er tung å bære.
translations.sv: Den här soffan är svår att bära.
translations.ro: Canapeaua asta e greu de cărat.
translations.da: Denne sofa er svær at bære.
translations.ja: このソファは運ぶのが大変です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'canapé'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'est'.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject 'canapé' to predicate adjective 'rude'.
Predicative adjective meaning difficult/arduous; takes an infinitival complement 'à porter'.
Preposition introducing the infinitive 'porter'; forms a complement to the adjective 'rude'.
Verb in infinitive form; complement of 'à' and of the adjective 'rude' ('rude à porter').

Le vent est rude ce matin.
On trouve ça rude à gérer.
Ce canapé est rude à porter.

Le vent est rude ce matin.
On trouve ça rude à gérer.
Ce canapé est rude à porter.
en: This day is rough for us.
The wind is harsh this morning.
We find it tough to handle.
This couch is tough to carry.
